name: Lamball
description: A walk up a hill tends to end with this Pal tumbling back down. This causes it to become dizzy and unable to move, making it easy to capture and kill. As a result, this Pal has tumbled down to the very bottom of the food chain itself.

partnerSkill.name: Fluffy Shield
partnerSkill.description: When activated, equips to the player and becomes a shield. Sometimes drops Wool when assigned to MonsterFarm.

activeSkills.name: Roly Poly
activeSkills.description: Lamball's exclusive skill. Curls into a ball, rolling after any enemies in its way. Becomes dizzy and unable to move after the attack ends.

activeSkills.name: Air Cannon
activeSkills.description: Quickly fires a burst of highly pressurized air.

activeSkills.name: Power Shot
activeSkills.description: Charges energy into a focused blast.

activeSkills.name: Implode
activeSkills.description: Risks its life to cause a violent explosion. Becomes incapacitated afterwards.

activeSkills.name: Lightning Bolt
activeSkills.description: Charges electric energy before blasting enemies with a powerful shock.

activeSkills.name: Power Bomb
activeSkills.description: Charges a massive amount of energy before firing a large destructive ball.

activeSkills.name: Pal Blast
activeSkills.description: Charges destructive energy before firing a high-powered beam forward across a wide area.

name: Cattiva
description: At a glance it appears full of confidence, but it is in fact weak and cowardly. Being toyed with by a Cattiva is in many ways the greatest of disgraces.

passiveSkills.name: Coward
passiveSkills.description: Lives in constant fear, but hey, that's what keeps it alive.

partnerSkill.name: Cat Helper
partnerSkill.description: While in team, Cattiva helps carry supplies, increasing the player's max carrying capacity.

activeSkills.name: Punch Flurry
activeSkills.description: Cattiva's exclusive skill. Chases after enemies, swinging both arms and delivering a flurry of punches.

activeSkills.name: Air Cannon
activeSkills.description: Quickly fires a burst of highly pressurized air.

activeSkills.name: Nightmare Ball
activeSkills.description: Creates a giant ball of darkness and hurls it at an enemy.

activeSkills.name: Power Shot
activeSkills.description: Charges energy into a focused blast.

activeSkills.name: Spine Vine
activeSkills.description: Generates spiny thorns that chase an enemy along the ground, piercing them from below.

activeSkills.name: Reflect Leaf
activeSkills.description: Launches a blade of wind that rebounds off enemies or trees, striking repeatedly. Can ricochet up to four times.

activeSkills.name: Pal Blast
activeSkills.description: Charges destructive energy before firing a high-powered beam forward across a wide area.

name: Foxparks
description: It is unskilled at controlling fire from the moment it is born and tends to choke on the flames it breathes unintentionally. Foxparks sneezes are one of the leading causes of forest fires.

partnerSkill.name: Huggy Fire
partnerSkill.description: When activated, equips to the player and transforms into a flamethrower.

activeSkills.name: Flare Arrow
activeSkills.description: Fires three flaming arrows in succession that home in on an enemy.

activeSkills.name: Nightmare Ball
activeSkills.description: Creates a giant ball of darkness and hurls it at an enemy.

activeSkills.name: Ignis Rage
activeSkills.description: Infuses the surrounding ground with energy, causing it to explode after a set amount of time.

activeSkills.name: Flare Storm
activeSkills.description: Generates two flaming tornadoes on either side before launching them at an enemy.

activeSkills.name: Spirit Fire
activeSkills.description: Shoots fireballs towards an enemy. The fireballs explode after a short distance, generating smaller fireballs that spread forward.

activeSkills.name: Mystic Whirlwind
activeSkills.description: Elphidran's exclusive skill. Generates twin whirlwinds imbued with a mysterious power that pursues enemies.

activeSkills.name: Phoenix Flare
activeSkills.description: Faleris' exclusive skill. After creating scorching tornadoes, it cloaks itself in hellfire and charges forward.

name: Incineram
description: In the dark of night, this Pal snatches prey to bring back to its territory. What happens to those poor souls afterwards isn't too hard to imagine.

partnerSkill.name: Flameclaw Hunter
partnerSkill.description: When activated, attacks targeted enemy with a powerful Unique_Baphomet_SwallowKite.

activeSkills.name: Flare Arrow
activeSkills.description: Fires three flaming arrows in succession that home in on an enemy.

activeSkills.name: Ignis Rage
activeSkills.description: Infuses the surrounding ground with energy, causing it to explode after a set amount of time.

activeSkills.name: Flare Storm
activeSkills.description: Generates two flaming tornadoes on either side before launching them at an enemy.

activeSkills.name: Hellfire Claw
activeSkills.description: Incineram's exclusive skill. Draws near enemies using its left claw to slash them into the air before cutting them down with its right claw.

activeSkills.name: Dragon Meteor
activeSkills.description: Summons numerous small meteorites and launches them at an enemy.

activeSkills.name: Phoenix Flare
activeSkills.description: Faleris' exclusive skill. After creating scorching tornadoes, it cloaks itself in hellfire and charges forward.

activeSkills.name: Volcanic Burst
activeSkills.description: Reptyro's exclusive skill. Raises its front legs and slams them into the ground, causing a volcanic eruptions under its enemies. It simultaneously bombards them with volcanic bombs from above.

description: Once seen as a symbol of nobility, and an idol for those who shunned wealth and power. Yet over time, this Pal became a token of death.

partnerSkill.name: Guardian of the Desert
partnerSkill.description: While fighting together, changes the player's attack type to COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Earth. Sometimes dodges attacks with a high speed sidestep while in battle.

activeSkills.name: Psycho Gravity
activeSkills.description: Utilizes psychokinesis to grab enemies before flinging them to the ground from above.

activeSkills.name: Power Bomb
activeSkills.description: Charges a massive amount of energy before firing a large destructive ball.

activeSkills.name: Spinning Roundhouse
activeSkills.description: Anubis' exclusive skill. Performs a spin kick with its strong legs, sweeping enemies over a wide area.

activeSkills.name: Forceful Charge
activeSkills.description: Anubis' exclusive skill. Rapidly pursues its foes while releasing energy and unleashing a powerful punch.

activeSkills.name: Ground Smash
activeSkills.description: Anubis' exclusive skill. Leaps high into the air and strikes a punch to the ground, causing a shockwave that deals damge over a wide area.

activeSkills.name: Shadow Burst
activeSkills.description: Quickly discharges dark energy, damaging those around it.

name: Jormuntide
description: Legend says the Jormuntide was once a wise man who, after being wrongly convicted and cast into a whirlpool, returned as this Pal to annihilate the kingdom.

partnerSkill.name: Stormbringer Sea Dragon
partnerSkill.description: Can be ridden to travel on water. While mounted, prevents stamina depletion while moving on water.

activeSkills.name: Hydro Jet
activeSkills.description: Hurls a high speed ball of water at an enemy.

activeSkills.name: Dark Cannon
activeSkills.description: Hurls an energy ball imbued with dark energy at an enemy.

activeSkills.name: Poison Fog
activeSkills.description: Generates a fog of poison in front, causing the opponent to become poisoned.

activeSkills.name: Geyser Gush
activeSkills.description: Erupts massive pillars of water beneath and around the enemy.

activeSkills.name: Lock-on Laser
activeSkills.description: Takes aim at an enemy before firing a super high speed laser.

activeSkills.name: Moonlight Beam
activeSkills.description: Selyne's exclusive skill. Stores energy in the moon on its back, then fires a crescent-shaped beam forward.

activeSkills.name: Acid Rain
activeSkills.description: Creates acidic clouds that pour down acid rain on enemies.

activeSkills.name: Dark Ball
activeSkills.description: Unleashes a sphere of darkness that slowly tracks down an enemy.

name: Croajiro
title: Harakiri Master
description: Those who disgrace the honor of the herd are forced to take their own life. By piercing their inflated vocal sac with a tree branch, they are blown away into the atmosphere and return to the afterlife.

partnerSkill.name: Leap Stance
partnerSkill.description: When activated, Croajiro swells its abdomen and channels its loyalty to build up energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air.

activeSkills.name: Hydro Jet
activeSkills.description: Hurls a high speed ball of water at an enemy.

activeSkills.name: Hydro Slicer
activeSkills.description: Mows down the frontal area with a blast of compressed water. The area struck by the blast erupts with water after a short delay.

activeSkills.name: Geyser Gush
activeSkills.description: Erupts massive pillars of water beneath and around the enemy.

activeSkills.name: Poison Shower
activeSkills.description: Focuses energy into the body and scatters poison orbs in all directions.

activeSkills.name: Acid Rain
activeSkills.description: Creates acidic clouds that pour down acid rain on enemies.

name: Croajiro Noct
description: The Croajiro who have forsaken their honor gather and form splinter groups. They will use any underhanded means to take down their chosen prey. If you encounter a pack of Croajiro Noct in the dead of the night, it's your life that's on the line.

partnerSkill.name: Shadow Stance
partnerSkill.description: When activated, Croajiro Noct swells its abdomen and channels its loyalty to build up energy. Climbing on top will propel the player high into the air. While in team, increases Attack of COMMON_ELEMENT_NAME_Dark Pals.

activeSkills.name: Dragon Cannon
activeSkills.description: Hurls an energy ball imbued with draconic energy at an enemy.

activeSkills.name: Comet Barrage
activeSkills.description: Drops meteorites one after another, generating shock waves around the impact areas.

activeSkills.name: Draconic Breath
activeSkills.description: Exhales breath imbued with draconic energy, dealing continuous damage to those in front of it.

activeSkills.name: Grass Tornado
activeSkills.description: Generates two tornadoes on either side before launching them at an enemy.

name: Croajiro Noct

activeSkills.name: Grass Tornado

name: Lullu
description: In early spring, pollen floats on the wind throughout the island. Flopie's hay fever is Lullu's fault.

partnerSkill.name: Floral Boost
partnerSkill.description: While at a base, Lullu fills the farm with good spirits, increasing the growth rate of the crops.

activeSkills.name: Spine Vine
activeSkills.description: Generates spiny thorns that chase an enemy along the ground, piercing them from below.

activeSkills.name: Reflect Leaf
activeSkills.description: Launches a blade of wind that rebounds off enemies or trees, striking repeatedly. Can ricochet up to four times.

activeSkills.name: Thunder Rain
activeSkills.description: Calls lightning that strikes an enemy after a set amount of time has passed.

activeSkills.name: Multicutter
activeSkills.description: The user fires three high-speed blades of wind in quick succession that fly straight at enemies.
Charge the power of lightning to the limit and fires multiple simultaneous electric shocks at the enemy.

activeSkills.name: Lethal Laser
activeSkills.description: After aiming at the enemy, fires multiple ultra-fast lightning lasers.

activeSkills.name: Crosswind
activeSkills.description: Conjures blades of wind in front of the enemy, converging to deliver a cutting cross attack.

name: Kikit
description: A decade ago, Kikit soccer was popular. However, it quickly fell out of favor due to fierce opposition from the Free Pal Alliance. Nevertheless, the Kikit's themselves didn't mind because it helped shed their old carapace.

partnerSkill.description: While in team, Kikit helps carry supplies, decreasing the weight of crude oil in the player's inventory.

name: Icelyn
description: Though its body melts in the heat, it just can’t resist sunbathing. Though its body melts in the warmth, it likes hot springs too much. If it's going to melt anyway, it hopes it’ll be in a steaming outdoor bath under a clear blue sky.

activeSkills.name: Rock Lance
